steps.title: Calculate 16 percent
steps.content: Convert $16\%$ to $0.16$ and multiply by the bill amount: $$0.16\cdot74.50=11.92.$$ The expected tip is 11.92 dollars.

steps.title: Choose the closest amount
steps.content: The closest choice to 11.92 dollars is 12.00 dollars, which is only 0.08 dollars away.

steps.title: Round to the nearest listed dollar amount
steps.content: The exact estimate is not one of the choices, so compare distances. $11.92$ is closest to $12.00$; it is farther from $10.00$ and $14.00$.
